'''Sienar Army Systems''' was yet another subsidiary of [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]]. It was created during the Reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] offensive to supply his new forces with war machines, by then-[[Director/Legends|Director]] of Santhe/Sienar Technologies, [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valles Santhe]]. Sienar Army Systems never achieved the prestige or renown of the [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], and would go down in history as a failure, despite its production of the [[TIE crawler/Legends|TIE Crawler]] used in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] reconquest of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Their goal was to act as the land counterpart of the SFS, and create ground vehicles for the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] while the SFS provided [[Starship/Legends|starships]] to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].
